operations.notes:
user_name: case insensitive, search mode: contains text
exact_name: when set to true, user_name search mode is case sensitive and exact text
show_permissions: when set to true, party permissions will be returned
email: case insentitive, search mode: exact match
Logical OR between user_name and email.

parameters.name: showIndirectRelation
parameters.description: Members that belong to the selected group only indirectly

operations.summary: Create new local users and Import LDAP users to SecureChange by simulating login process
operations.notes:
This API implicitly imports LDAP users as automatics users to SecureChange by simulating their login.
To explicitly import LDAP entities- both users and groups, it is recommended to use /users/import API

parameters.description: Specifies the fields that will be returned in the response. FULL returns all fields. BASIC returns selected fields only. In the examples, you can see the list of fields returned for BASIC

operations.summary: Delete the specified User or Group

responseMessages.message: User with id {id} does not exist

operations.notes:
The imported user / group will be visible in SecureChange GUI under users section.
In multi domain mode, imported entity will be assigned with the domains of "any user" group.
Only users with 'view settings tab' permission can run this API.

operations.summary: Update the roles that are assigned to a group or a user
operations.notes:
Update the roles assigned to existing group or user. Roles are identified by their unique name (not case-sensitive). An empty role list will remove all roles assigned to the specified group or user.
Running this API requires 'View Settings tab and configure Orchestration Suite settings' permission.
